name: Catfish and Crawfish Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop catfish and crawfish in a food processor.
2. Add the chopped catfish and crawfish to a bowl with white wine, parsley, lemon juice, and salt. Mix well.
3. Stir in the Louisiana hot sauce and Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce until combined.
4. Transfer the mixture into a mold.
5. Refrigerate overnight.
6. Serve with crackers or on a bed of lettuce. If crawfish is unavailable, substitute with shrimp.
